message:
feat(db,server,cli): add archive message inventory tracking and automatic drift recovery

Implement lightweight archive scanning to detect duplicate canonical message files
and message ID drift between archive and SQLite. Add startup probe to automatically
recover healthy-but-stale databases from archive while salvaging DB-only state with
rollback safety.

Key additions:
- ArchiveMessageInventory struct for read-only archive scanning with duplicate detection
- reconstruct_sqlite_file_with_archive_salvage() with quarantine and rollback on failure
- attempt_archive_drift_recovery() in startup probe pipeline
- DoctorArchiveInventory in CLI for enhanced doctor output with duplicate/thread tracking
- Extended ReconstructStats with duplicate canonical message file and ID counts
- Integration test for probe_integrity archive-ahead recovery scenario

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
